_note: Representative news-context snippets standing in for the production join: intelligence_db.relation_evidence_raw.evidence_text / nlp_db chunks where the entity was mentioned. The live platform DB was DOWN during this eval (no running containers), so for the OBSCURE cohort these snippets are hand-built from public reporting to faithfully emulate the kind of 1-3 evidence sentences the worker would inject. Entities that are genuinely unknown/ambiguous in public sources are given sparse or no context on purpose, to test whether grounding still curbs fabrication when the news itself is thin. Well-known entities are left empty (the no-context arm already grounds them perfectly).
SharkNinja, Inc. is a global product design and technology company that markets Shark and Ninja branded home appliances such as vacuums, blenders and air fryers.
SharkNinja shares trade on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker SN after the company separated from JS Global Lifestyle.
Xcel Brands, Inc. is a media and consumer-products company that designs, licenses and markets brands across television, social commerce and live streaming.
Xcel Brands trades on the Nasdaq under the ticker XELB.
AMZW: AMZW is the ticker symbol for a leveraged single-stock exchange-traded product offering weekly exposure tied to Amazon.com.
five-year note: The five-year note refers to the U.S. Treasury note with a five-year maturity, auctioned regularly by the Treasury and widely used as a benchmark for medium-term interest rates.
Valaris: Valaris Limited is an offshore drilling contractor that operates a fleet of drillships, semisubmersibles and jackup rigs for oil and gas companies worldwide.
Valaris trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker VAL.
Banza: Banza is a U.S. food company that makes chickpea-based pasta, rice and other pantry products sold in grocery stores nationwide.
Paragon Acura: Paragon Acura is an automobile dealership in the New York City area selling and servicing Acura vehicles.
Guotai Haitong Securities: Guotai Haitong Securities is a Chinese brokerage and investment bank formed through the merger of Guotai Junan Securities and Haitong Securities.
The combined firm is one of the largest securities companies in China by assets.
Morgan & Morgan: Morgan & Morgan is a large U.S. personal-injury law firm headquartered in Orlando, Florida, known for consumer litigation and its 'For the People' advertising.
Mark Meador: Mark Meador was sworn in as a Commissioner of the U.S. Federal Trade Commission, where he focuses on antitrust enforcement.
Before joining the FTC, Meador worked as an antitrust attorney and Senate staffer.
Allison McNeely: Allison McNeely is a journalist who reports on credit, private equity and distressed debt for a financial news outlet.
